versions.name: P1-Design-2026
versions.description: Phase 1 — Design & Validation (2026). Impact analysis, sandbox data mapping, Go/No-Go gate at year-end. Source: Framework §1.3 Approach.

versions.name: P2-Implementation-2027
versions.description: Phase 2 — Implementation & Deployment (2027). Data harmonisation, full configuration, UAT, production deployment (FM & PS) aligned with 44 C/5 preparation. Source: Framework §1.3 Approach.

versions.name: P3-BPGM-2027-2028
versions.description: Phase 3 — Business Partners & Grants Management (2027-2028). BP redesign deployment, GM sandbox and go-live. Source: Framework §1.3 Approach.
